name: WTPL-001
template_body: Hello! Your laundry order {{order}} has been received. Lot number: {{lot_number}}. Expected ready by {{expected_ready_date}}. Thank you for choosing Spinly!

name: WTPL-002
template_body: Hi! Your laundry order {{order}} is READY for pickup at Spinly. Please collect at your earliest convenience.

name: WTPL-003
template_body: Thank you for your payment of Rs.{{grand_total}} for order {{order}}. We appreciate your business! See you next time.

name: WTPL-004
template_body: We miss you at Spinly! It's been a while since your last visit. Come back and enjoy our fresh laundry service. We're here for you!

name: WTPL-005
template_body: Congratulations! You've earned a Spinly Scratch Card for order {{order}}! Visit the store to reveal your prize. Good luck!

name: WTPL-006
template_body: Thank you, {{customer_name}}! As a valued {{tier}} member, your clothes receive our premium care. See you soon at Spinly!
